patch:
--- a/synchronous_counter.v
+++ b/synchronous_counter.v
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 module synchronous_counter(
   input clk,
   input rst_n,
   output reg [15:0] count
 );
 
-  always @(posedge clk)
+  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)
   begin
     if (~rst_n)
       count <= 16'h0000;
     else
       count <= count + 1;
   end
 
 endmodule
